message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 433 — oneshot mid-flight gap confirmed

Attaches tick-433 bead comment confirming the mid-flight-cancel-waker
gap generalises from mpsc to oneshot (commit 1c940a55). Paired
primitive × cancel-timing matrix now covers pre-cancel + mid-flight
pattern on both channel types. Local count 105/105.
